title: hieracium subneglectum
intro: Hieracium subneglectum, a lesser-known species within the Hieracium genus, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as a diuretic, helping to remove excess fluids from the body. The health benefits associated with Hieracium subneglectum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Hieracium subneglectum are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its efficacy and potential interactions with other medications.
